title: Colores de Pasión
overview: Legend has it that an invisible thread connects those who are destined to meet regardless of the time, place or circumstances. The thread may be lengthened or entangled, but it will never break. Pablo and Melisa seem to be linked to that destiny, but a love triangle with Vanesa will make things difficult.
